steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The student wants to support a claim about the archive having both older and newer artifacts. To accomplish this goal effectively, a response must explicitly demonstrate this time-period contrast with concrete examples from the notes.

steps.title: Match the choice to the goal
steps.content:
Choice D explicitly states “both old and new” and provides specific examples: a rubber stamp made in the 1800s and a cane trunk basket made in 2019.

The other three choices fall short by presenting only one era, focusing on artifact types rather than time periods, or implying without demonstrating the contrast.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
